user.title: Per-Device Default Dashboard
user.description: Adds a per-device default dashboard router. After adding, use Configure to map device types to dashboards.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Already configured. Only a single instance is allowed.

edit_mappings.title: Map device types to dashboards
edit_mappings.description: Pick a dashboard for each device type. Leave a type as “(no override — use default)” to fall back to the default / the user's normal dashboard.

abort.no_user_overrides: There are no user overrides to remove.
